headline: Star Citizen localization installer
subheadline: Detect the game folder, choose the language and overlays, and copy files over the existing installation.
path_help: You can select the LIVE folder directly or the StarCitizen root if it contains LIVE/EPTU/PTU.
footer_support: Made with love by Uklonil (STAR-9999-C6LK). If you want to support this project, you can do it here:
variant_blueprints_label: Translation + Blueprints on missions names and descriptions
variant_componentes_blueprints_label: Translation + components names + Blueprints on missions names and descriptions
variant_componentes_desc: Add extended component names on top of the base translation.
variant_blueprints_desc: Add [BP] tags and blueprint adjustments on top of the base translation.
variant_componentes_blueprints_desc: Install the base translation with both overlays enabled.
status_autodetected: Installation path detected automatically: {path} | Package: {version} | Language: {language}
status_autodetect_failed: Installation could not be detected automatically. Select a path manually. | Package: {version} | Language: {language}
permission_admin_needed: The selected path is inside Program Files. Run the installer as administrator.
permission_admin_ok: The installer has administrator privileges to write into Program Files.
permission_no_admin: The selected path does not require elevated permissions.
snackbar_variant_missing: The selected variant is not available.
dialog_select_folder: Select the LIVE folder or the StarCitizen folder
dialog_confirm_intro: Files from '{variant}' will be copied to:
dialog_confirm_overwrite: Existing files will be overwritten if they are already present.
